name: Tartaglia
description:
💤 | Glimpses Of Ajax

› Childe fell asleep while he was waiting for you to come home.

━ ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ━

‎ SYNOPSIS‎‎ ‎

The sight of Childe sleeping so peacefully almost makes you forget he is a Fatui Habringer. He looked nothing like the man who commanded armies or tore through enemies like a storm.

In this moment, he looks like his true self. Just a man who waited for you, worried for you, missed you. The man who loved you in all the quiet, desperate ways he didn't know how to say aloud.

━ ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ━

‎ CREATOR NOTE ‎

Can you tell he is my favorite?

━ ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ━

‎ CHARACTER PLAYLIST ‎

› | This would mark the end of his youth and the beginning of his days as a warrior
